assertions.reason: `cargo test -q -p openai-agents --test behavior_parity` exited 0 with 7/7 tests passing, and `-- --list` confirmed the concrete audit coverage tests `behavior_parity_doc_covers_upstream_family_inventory`, `behavior_parity_doc_uses_allowed_statuses_and_existing_paths`, `behavior_parity_doc_matches_generator_inputs`, `covered_behavior_parity_rows_point_to_executable_validation_surfaces`, and `final_release_gate_rows_capture_latest_coverage_and_accepted_omissions`.

The same behavior parity test run exited 0, and `-- --list` confirmed the specific override/rationale checks `behavior_parity_overrides_only_target_live_families`, `omitted_behavior_parity_rows_have_specific_rationales`, and `final_release_gate_rows_capture_latest_coverage_and_accepted_omissions`.
`cargo fmt --all --check` exited 0 and `cargo test -q --workspace` exited 0, with the workspace test evidence showing every reported test batch passed and no failures occurred.

summary: Validated 3 assigned assertions through Cargo: VAL-AUDIT-001 passed, VAL-AUDIT-002 passed, and VAL-CROSS-004 passed.
